title: Sum two numbers based on dropdown
excerpt: I have an original budget and additional revenue that could be assigned to multiple budgets. I need an automation, that when a status is selected, that matches another status, the revenue status column will be added to t…

posts.author: MeghanCastro (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an original budget and additional revenue that could be assigned to multiple budgets. I need an automation, that when a status is selected, that matches another status, the revenue status column will be added to the original budget.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Are both statuses on the same board or different? Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Meghan, that’s doable using make. It will be custom automation, let me know if you need help with setting up that.

Regards
Rehan AQ
Book time with me

posts.author: MeghanCastro (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: They’re on the same board but different items. I believe I have CRM

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m pretty confident that it can be done with the workflow center (Enterprise only). Do you have this logo at the top right?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t think of a way to do it natively then, at least with what I can understand with what you’re looking for. Can you maybe provide a bit more detail/screenshots?
